audience_policies.source_phrase: THIS IS A COUPON PASS Library pass admits up to 6 guests to Davis Farmland or Davis Mega Maze at the gate with a savings of $10 off per ticket Children under 2 are free of charge. NOTICE: Adults must be accompanied by at least one child 12 years or younger when visiting Davis Far
